text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. Vice President Vance is expected to depart Washington on Tuesday for Pakistan to participate in the latest round of talks with Iran. A second round of negotiations between U.S. and Iranian delegations is currently planned for Wednesday in Islamabad, though officials cautioned the situation remains fluid amid ongoing tensions and public rhetoric. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：美国副总统万斯预计将于周二离开华盛顿前往巴基斯坦，参加与伊朗的最新一轮会谈。目前计划于周三在伊斯兰堡举行美伊代表团之间的第二轮谈判，但官员们提醒称，在持续的紧张局势和公开言论中，局势仍然不稳定。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸⚡️FBI Director Kash Patel just dropped a $250 MILLION defamation bomb on The Atlantic and reporter Sarah Fitzpatrick. The article claimed “bouts of excessive drinking” and unexplained absences. Patel says it’s “categorically false” and a “fabricated hit…" 🇺🇸 Key allegations against Kash Patel — The Atlantic ➡️ Erratic behavior & judgment Patel panicked and frantically called aides claiming he'd been fired after a routine IT login error — what officials described as a full "freak-out." The article characterizes him as erratic, suspicious, and prone to jumping to conclusions without evidence. ➡️ Excessive drinking Multiple officials raised concerns about his alcohol use as a national security vulnerability. He was filmed chugging beer on official travel in Italy, prompting Trump — who doesn't drink — to call him personally to express displeasure. Officials question whether alcohol contributed to instances where Patel shared inaccurate information about active investigations. ➡️ Abuse of perks & poor attendance Patel has drawn criticism at the White House for spotty office attendance and use of the FBI jet for personal travel, with aides reportedly fearing Trump's reaction if he focused on those stories. ➡️ Politicizing the FBI Patel has directed purges of agents he considers insufficiently loyal to Trump, fired staff, opened internal investigations, and pressured agents to quit for pushing back on his directives. Employees are polygraphed to identify leakers — and reportedly asked whether they've ever said anything critical of Patel or the president. ➡️ National security concerns Days before the US launched operations against Iran, Patel fired members of a counterintelligence squad focused in part on Iran. Officials say the rushed firings left the US shorthanded at a critical moment. High turnover and leadership vacuums are described as eroding the FBI's ability to detect and counter terrorist threats. ➡️ Job insecurity Senior Trump administration officials are already discussing potential replacements, and FBI staff are described as waiting for the official word that he's out. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇺🇸⚡️FBI局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）刚刚向《大西洋月刊》和记者莎拉·菲茨帕特里克（Sarah Fitzpatrick）投下了一枚2.5亿美元的诽谤炸弹。该文章声称他有‘酗酒发作’和无法解释的缺勤。帕特尔称这是‘绝对虚假’的，是一篇‘捏造的抹黑文章……’” 🇺🇸 对卡什·帕特尔的主要指控 — 《大西洋月刊》 ➡️ 行为与判断力反复无常 帕特尔在一次常规IT登录错误后惊慌失措，疯狂致电助手声称自己被解雇了——官员们将其描述为彻底的“崩溃”。文章将他描述为反复无常、多疑，且容易在没有证据的情况下妄下结论。 ➡️ 酗酒 多名官员对他的饮酒问题表示担忧，认为这构成了国家安全漏洞。他曾被拍到在意大利执行公务期间狂饮啤酒，促使不喝酒的特朗普亲自致电表达不满。官员们质疑酒精是否导致了帕特尔分享有关正在进行的调查的不准确信息。 ➡️ 滥用职权与出勤率低 帕特尔在白宫因办公室出勤率不稳定和使用FBI专机进行私人旅行而受到批评，据报道，助手们担心如果特朗普关注这些报道会作何反应。 ➡️ 将FBI政治化 帕特尔主导清洗了他认为对特朗普不够忠诚的特工，解雇员工，开启内部调查，并向那些反对他指令的特工施压要求其辞职。员工被要求接受测谎以识别泄密者——据报道，他们还被问及是否曾发表过对帕特尔或总统的批评言论。 ➡️ 国家安全担忧 在美国对伊朗采取行动的前几天，帕特尔解雇了反间谍小组的成员，该小组的部分工作重点是伊朗。官员们表示，仓促的解雇导致美国在关键时刻人手不足。高离职率和领导层真空被描述为削弱了FBI发现和反击恐怖威胁的能力。 ➡️ 工作不稳定性 特朗普政府的高级官员已经在讨论潜在的继任者，FBI员工被描述为正在等待他离职的正式通知。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @gbrew24 : Now reported that Vance will not be leaving until tomorrow. It takes 16 hours to get to Islamabad. That means discussions can really only start Weds. morning ET, which is Weds. evening local time. Ceasefire technically expires Tuesday. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @gbrew24：现报道万斯（Vance）要到明天才会离开。前往伊斯兰堡需要16个小时。这意味着讨论实际上只能在美东时间周三上午，即当地时间周三晚上开始。停火协议在技术上周二到期。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz The US escalation is meant to increase pressure on Iran, but there is also a clock running for how long this will last without fighting. It takes time for the blockade to bite, but when it does, we can expect that Iran will resume its attacks (and with it, the war) The U.S. military is preparing to expand its blockade in coming days by boarding Iran-linked oil tankers and seizing commercial ships in international waters, according to U.S. officials quoted by the WSJ - Michael A. Horowitz tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz） 美国的升级旨在增加对伊朗的压力，但距离爆发战斗的时间也在倒计时。封锁生效需要时间，但一旦生效，我们可以预期伊朗将恢复攻击（随之而来的是战争）。据《华尔街日报》援引美国官员的话称，美军正准备在未来几天扩大封锁，登临与伊朗有关的油轮并在国际水域扣押商船。 - 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz The U.S. military is preparing to expand its blockade in coming days by boarding Iran-linked oil tankers and seizing commercial ships in international waters, according to U.S. officials quoted by the WSJ tweet

text: Michael A. Horowitz US military says it directed 27 vessels to return back to Iranian ports. Since the commencement of the blockade against ships entering or exiting Iranian ports and coastal areas, U.S. forces have directed 27 vessels to turn around or return to an Iranian port. - U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 美军称已指挥27艘船只返回伊朗港口。自针对进出伊朗港口和沿海地区的船只实施封锁以来，美军已指挥27艘船只掉头或返回伊朗港口。 - 美国中央司令部 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 NYT: An Iranian delegation is preparing to travel to Islamabad on Tuesday for potential negotiations with the U.S., with Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf expected to attend. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The IDF reports it has killed two Hamas operatives in separate strikes in the central Gaza Strip. Ayman Hosna was targeted on Sunday and was involved in manufacturing and repairing weapons used in attacks against IDF troops. In a separate strike on Monday, the IDF said it killed Anas Khaled Saafi, who it claims was planning an attack against Israeli forces in the immediate timeframe. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列国防军报告称，其在加沙地带中部的单独袭击中击毙了两名哈马斯成员。艾曼·霍斯纳（Ayman Hosna）于周日成为目标，他曾参与制造和维修用于袭击以色列国防军部队的武器。在周一的另一次袭击中，以色列国防军称击毙了阿纳斯·哈立德·萨菲（Anas Khaled Saafi），据称他当时正计划在近期内对以色列军队发动袭击。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 No one in the US seems to know what's actually happening with the talks. Reporting is all over the place — from a deal being signed today, to talks scheduled for Wednesday, to Schrödinger's Vance: simultaneously en route to Pakistan and still in the US. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国似乎没人知道谈判到底发生了什么。报道众说纷纭——从今天签署协议，到定于周三进行的谈判，再到“薛定谔的万斯”：既在前往巴基斯坦的途中，又还在美国国内。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Argentina's President Javier Milei: With certain cultures, it’s not possible to coexist.
text_zh: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱：对于某些文化，共存是不可能的。

text: 🇷🇺 🇩🇪 The German Foreign Ministry summoned Russian Ambassador to Berlin Sergei Nechayev in connection with the publication by the Russian Defense Ministry of the addresses of drone manufacturers for Kiev located in Europe "Direct threats from Russia against targets in Germany are an attempt to weaken our support for Ukraine and test our unity," the message said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇩🇪 德国外交部召见了俄罗斯驻柏林大使谢尔盖·涅恰耶夫，原因与俄罗斯国防部公布了位于欧洲的基辅无人机制造商地址有关。声明称：“俄罗斯对德国目标的直接威胁，是试图削弱我们对乌克兰的支持并考验我们的团结。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🟨 🇮🇷 The U.S. Embassy in Iraq has issued a security alert for U.S. citizens in the country, warning that Iranian aligned militias in the country continue to target U.S. citizens. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🟨 🇮🇷 美国驻伊拉克大使馆向在伊拉克的美国公民发布了安全警报，警告称该国境内的伊朗支持的民兵组织继续以美国公民为目标。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Iran has expressed readiness to do everything possible to ensure the unimpeded passage of Russian vessels and cargo through the Strait of Hormuz, Russia's Foreign Ministry announced. Sergei Lavrov held a phone call with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. Key points: ➡️ Araghchi briefed Lavrov on Iran's position regarding US ceasefire violations, including the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and the seizure of an Iranian container ship. ➡️ Moscow emphasized the importance of maintaining the ceasefire and continuing diplomatic efforts toward conflict resolution. ➡️ Russia expressed readiness to facilitate agreements between Iran and the Gulf states. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 俄罗斯外交部宣布，伊朗已表示准备尽一切可能确保俄罗斯船只和货物畅通无阻地通过霍尔木兹海峡。谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫与伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希进行了通话。要点：➡️ 阿拉格希向拉夫罗夫通报了伊朗关于美国违反停火协议的立场，包括封锁霍尔木兹海峡和扣押一艘伊朗集装箱船。➡️ 莫斯科强调了维持停火和继续外交努力以解决冲突的重要性。➡️ 俄罗斯表示愿意促进伊朗与海湾国家之间的协议。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar says he would arrest Netanyahu if he comes to Hungary: I made it clear that Hungary intends to remain a member of the International Criminal Court. If someone enters the territory of a country that is a member of the ICC and that person is under an arrest warrant, then they must be taken into custody.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）表示，如果内塔尼亚胡来到匈牙利，他会将其逮捕：我已明确表示，匈牙利打算继续作为国际刑事法院的成员国。如果有人进入国际刑事法院成员国的领土，且此人身负逮捕令，那么他们必须被拘留。

text: Open Source Intel Around 200 tourists were temporarily stranded on Morro Dois Irmãos, a well known hiking peak in Rio de Janeiro’s Vidigal area, after a police raid targeting the Comando Vermelho, one of Brazil’s largest criminal gangs. Gunfire broke out during the operation, forcing visitors to stay on the mountain for safety. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：在里约热内卢维迪加尔地区，由于警方针对巴西最大的犯罪团伙之一“红色司令部”（Comando Vermelho）进行突袭，约200名游客被暂时困在著名的徒步山峰“双子峰”（Morro Dois Irmãos）上。行动期间爆发了枪战，迫使游客留在山上以确保安全。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian President: “Honoring commitments is the basis of meaningful dialogue. Deep historical mistrust in Iran toward U.S. gov conduct remains, while unconstructive & contradictory signals from American officials carry a bitter message; they seek Iran's surrender. Iranians do not submit to force.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗总统：“履行承诺是进行有意义对话的基础。伊朗对美国政府行为的深层历史不信任依然存在，而美国官员发出的非建设性且相互矛盾的信号传递了一个苦涩的信息；他们寻求伊朗的投降。伊朗人不会屈服于武力。”推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “Israel did not push me into a war with Iran; the events of October 7, along with my long-held belief that Iran must never obtain nuclear weapons, led me to this decision.” 📌 “I’m amazed when I watch and read so-called ‘fake news’ experts and polls. About 90% of what they say is false or fabricated, and the polls are manipulated — just like the 2020 presidential election was. Similar to Venezuela — which the media avoids discussing — the outcome in Iran will be surprising. And if Iran’s new leaders act wisely, the country could have a great and prosperous future.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “以色列并没有推动我与伊朗开战；10月7日的事件，加上我长期以来认为伊朗绝不能获得核武器的信念，促使我做出了这个决定。” 📌 “当我看到并读到所谓的‘假新闻’专家和民意调查时，我感到很惊讶。他们所说的话中约有90%是虚假或捏造的，民意调查也被操纵了——就像2020年总统大选一样。与委内瑞拉类似——媒体避免讨论这一点——伊朗的结果将令人惊讶。如果伊朗的新领导人行事明智，这个国家可能会有一个伟大而繁荣的未来。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah infrastructure under IDF control is being decimated. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046252925450588258/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Ukraine has released footage of tests for a domestically developed tracked armored vehicle prototype named Skif, according to Ukrainian company Ukrarmotekh. 🔻 The company’s CEO, Hennadii Khyrhii, first revealed last summer that work was underway on a Ukrainian-made tracked armored vehicle, developed with the involvement of foreign specialists. 🔻 Exact technical specifications have not been disclosed, but based on its appearance, earlier assumptions by Ukrainian experts seem confirmed — the design is likely based on the American M113 armored personnel carrier. 🔻 Ukrarmotekh is known for producing the UAT-TISA and GYURZA series armored vehicles, which are already widely used by Ukraine’s armed forces and other security agencies. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇦 据乌克兰公司Ukrarmotekh称，乌克兰发布了名为“Skif”的国产履带式装甲车原型车的测试视频。🔻 该公司首席执行官Hennadii Khyrhii去年夏天首次透露，正在开发一种乌克兰制造的履带式装甲车，并有外国专家的参与。🔻 具体技术规格尚未披露，但根据其外观，乌克兰专家早先的假设似乎得到了证实——该设计很可能基于美国的M113装甲运兵车。🔻 Ukrarmotekh以生产UAT-TISA和GYURZA系列装甲车而闻名，这些车辆已被乌克兰武装部队和其他安全机构广泛使用。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa plays basketball—this time on a proper court.
text_zh: 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmed al-Sharaa）正在打篮球——这次是在一个正规的球场上。

text: French President Macron: It is likely that, following the American decision to maintain a targeted blockade — particularly concerning Iran — the Iranian authorities changed their initial position. I think this is a mistake on both sides.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：在美国决定维持有针对性的封锁（特别是针对伊朗）之后，伊朗当局很可能改变了他们最初的立场。我认为这对双方来说都是一个错误。

text: FBI Director Kash Patel is suing The Atlantic and reporter Sarah Fitzpatrick for defamation over an article alleging he has a drinking problem and frequently misses work. Patel denies the allegations and is seeking $250 million. The Atlantic says it stands by its reporting and will fight the case.
text_zh: 联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）因一篇指控他有酗酒问题且经常旷工的文章，起诉《大西洋月刊》及其记者莎拉·菲茨帕特里克（Sarah Fitzpatrick）诽谤。帕特尔否认了这些指控，并寻求2.5亿美元的赔偿。《大西洋月刊》表示坚持其报道内容，并将应诉。

text: 🇷🇺 Russian Tu-22M3 long-range bombers conducted a patrol flight over the Baltic Sea, escorted by Su-35 fighters. The mission lasted over four hours. At various points along the route, the aircraft were shadowed by foreign fighter jets. All flights were conducted in strict accordance with international airspace regulations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯图-22M3远程轰炸机在苏-35战斗机的护航下，在波罗的海上空进行了巡逻飞行。任务持续了四个多小时。在航线的不同阶段，这些飞机受到了外国战斗机的跟踪。所有飞行均严格按照国际空域法规进行。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 “Iranians Do Not Submit to Force” — Iran’s President Fires Back at American Regime 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 “伊朗人不会屈服于武力”——伊朗总统回击美国政权 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 Pentagon-linked IT giant Palantir has published on its X page key excerpts from a book by company CEO Alexander Karp, The Technological Republic, in which he calls for the introduction of universal military conscription in the United States and the remilitarization of Germany and Japan. Palantir CEO Alexander Karp's book The Technological Republic — key theses: ➡️ Silicon Valley has a moral obligation to participate in national defense. The tech elite owes a debt to the country that made its rise possible. ➡️ The atomic age is ending. A new era of deterrence built on AI is beginning. The question is not whether AI weapons will be built — but who builds them and for what purpose. ➡️ Soft power has reached its limits. Democratic societies need hard power, and in this century hard power runs on software. ➡️ Universal military conscription should be seriously considered. The next war should only be fought if every citizen shares in the risk and cost. ➡️ Germany and Japan must be remilitarized. Their postwar disarmament was an overcorrection — Europe is already paying the price, and Japanese pacifism threatens the Asian balance of power. ➡️ Federal compensation is so poor that government struggles to attract real talent. Public servants should not be expected to take vows of poverty. ➡️ Cancel culture and the ruthless exposure of officials' private lives drives competent people away from government service — leaving the republic with empty vessels at the helm. ➡️ All cultures are not equal. Some have produced extraordinary advances; others have proven regressive. The West's hollow pluralism avoids this reality entirely. ➡️ The iPhone may be Silicon Valley's greatest achievement — and also a sign of civilizational stagnation. Consumer apps are not a substitute for grand ambition. ➡️ Elon Musk's pursuit of large-scale projects deserves respect, not mockery. Billionaires who build beyond self-enrichment should be applauded. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 与五角大楼有关联的IT巨头帕兰提尔（Palantir）在其X页面上发布了公司首席执行官亚历山大·卡普（Alexander Karp）所著《技术共和国》（The Technological Republic）一书的关键摘录，他在书中呼吁在美国实行全民义务兵役制，并要求德国和日本重新军事化。帕兰提尔首席执行官亚历山大·卡普的《技术共和国》一书关键论点：➡️ 硅谷有道德义务参与国防。科技精英欠这个使他们崛起国家的一笔债。➡️ 原子时代即将结束。一个建立在人工智能基础上的新威慑时代正在开始。问题不在于是否会制造人工智能武器，而在于由谁制造以及出于什么目的。➡️ 软实力已达到极限。民主社会需要硬实力，而在本世纪，硬实力依靠软件运行。➡️ 应认真考虑全民义务兵役制。下一场战争只有在每个公民都分担风险和成本的情况下才应进行。➡️ 德国和日本必须重新军事化。他们战后的裁军是一种矫枉过正——欧洲已经在付出代价，而日本的和平主义威胁着亚洲的权力平衡。➡️ 联邦薪酬太低，导致政府难以吸引真正的人才。不应期望公务员发誓过贫困生活。➡️ 取消文化和对官员私生活的无情曝光将有能力的人赶出了政府服务部门——使共和国的掌舵者空有其表。➡️ 并非所有文化都是平等的。一些文化产生了非凡的进步；另一些则被证明是倒退的。西方空洞的多元主义完全回避了这一现实。➡️ iPhone可能是硅谷最伟大的成就，但也可能是文明停滞的标志。消费类应用程序不能替代宏大的抱负。➡️ 埃隆·马斯克对大规模项目的追求值得尊重，而不是嘲笑。应该为那些超越自我致富而进行建设的亿万富翁鼓掌。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @BarakRavid : State Department official: The United States will host a second round of ambassador-level talks between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday, April 23, at the Department of State. The United States welcomes the productive engagement that began on April 14. We will continue to facilitate direct, good-faith discussions between the two governments tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @BarakRavid : 国务院官员：美国将于4月23日星期四在国务院主办第二轮以色列与黎巴嫩之间的大使级会谈。美国欢迎4月14日开始的富有成效的接触。我们将继续促进两国政府之间直接、真诚的讨论 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @hughhewitt : Which is why the “nuclear dust” as @POTUS calls it, must be recovered and sent to the U.S. to be neutralized. Anything less is a diplomatic defeat following a military victory. 60 Minutes: Iran still has nearly 1,000 pounds of highly-enriched uranium, "enough material, if you enrich it just a little bit more, for 10-11 nuclear bombs." "Iran has been lying about its nuclear weapons effort for over 20 years now." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046246259283890247/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转推 @hughhewitt : 这就是为什么 @POTUS 所称的“核尘埃”必须被回收并送往美国进行中和。任何低于此标准的行为都是在军事胜利后的外交失败。60分钟节目：伊朗仍拥有近1000磅高浓缩铀，“如果再稍微浓缩一点，就足以制造10-11枚核弹。”“伊朗在核武器计划上已经撒谎超过20年了。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046246259283890247/video/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese sources report an Israeli drone strike on the village of Qaaqaiyat al-Jisr in southern Lebanon, notably outside the Yellow Line zone. Several injured. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩消息人士报告称，以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部的Qaaqaiyat al-Jisr村，值得注意的是该地点位于黄线区域之外。造成数人受伤。 推文

Iran has the upper hand over the U.S. America was forced to seek a ceasefire." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046247477058080951/video/1 tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) USAF Boeing C-17A Globemaster III airlifter landing at the PAF Base Nur Khan in Pakistan this evening. Most likely a part of logistical preparations for the arrival of US delegation for the second round of negotiations with the Iranians in Islamabad. https://x.com/i/status/2046235141375480050/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 美国空军波音C-17A环球霸王III运输机今晚降落在巴基斯坦努尔汗空军基地。这很可能是为美国代表团抵达伊斯兰堡与伊朗人进行第二轮谈判所做的后勤准备的一部分。 https://x.com/i/status/2046235141375480050/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump told Bloomberg it’s "highly unlikely" he would extend the two-week ceasefire with Iran if a deal is not reached before it ends, adding that the U.S. naval blockade will remain in effect until an agreement is finalized. "They want me to open it. The Iranians desperately want it opened. I’m not opening it until a deal is signed," Trump said. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统告诉彭博社，如果在此之前未达成协议，他“极不可能”延长与伊朗的两周停火协议，并补充说，在协议最终敲定之前，美国的海上封锁将继续有效。“他们想让我开放。伊朗人迫切希望开放。在协议签署之前，我不会开放，”特朗普说。 推文
